LanguageData.RimDoctor.Panel.Error: This panel hit an error and was disabled for safety. See the log.
LanguageData.RimDoctor.Settings.TextureFallback.Tip: Substitutes a generated placeholder for any texture that fails to load, instead of returning null (which freezes/crashes screens). Headline feature — recommended ON.
LanguageData.RimDoctor.Settings.LogDoctor: Enable Log Doctor (explain errors in plain language)
LanguageData.RimDoctor.Settings.Tier.Max: Maximum — rewrite/disable broken defs (via override mod)
LanguageData.RimDoctor.Sorter.Prompt: Press 'Sort now' to compute a proposed load order.
LanguageData.RimDoctor.Sorter.Same: Your current order already matches the proposed order.
LanguageData.RimDoctor.Sorter.ApplyFail: Apply failed — load order unchanged (see log).
LanguageData.RimDoctor.Sorter.Confirm:
Apply the proposed load order and restart RimWorld now?

• ModsConfig.xml will be backed up first.
• The game will close and relaunch with the new order.
• Save your game before continuing if needed.
LanguageData.RimDoctor.Health.Prompt: Press 'Scan now' to check all active mods for missing textures and incomplete downloads.
LanguageData.RimDoctor.Health.AllClean: Nothing to show. Everything scanned looks clean!
LanguageData.RimDoctor.Health.Undone: Removed the generated RimDoctor Overrides mod. Restart to apply.
LanguageData.RimDoctor.Health.NothingUndo: Nothing to undo (no generated override mod found).
LanguageData.RimDoctor.Health.RestartPrompt: Repairs written. Enable 'RimDoctor Overrides' and restart RimWorld now?\n\nRimWorld only loads mods at startup, so the fixes take effect after a restart. RimDoctor will enable the override mod (it loads last) for you.
LanguageData.RimDoctor.LogDoctor.Copied: Log Doctor report copied to clipboard.
LanguageData.RimDoctor.LogDoctor.None: No issues captured yet. Errors and warnings will appear here as they occur.
LanguageData.RimDoctor.Diag.Copied: Full diagnostic report copied to clipboard.
LanguageData.RimDoctor.Diag.Clean: Nothing at this severity. Run a Health scan + Sort for the fullest picture.
